navy.$description: Brand navy. Primary page background on all non-Talent pages.

pink.$description: Brand accent pink. Highlights, active states, pink statement block.

cream.$description: Brand cream. Default text on dark surfaces.

black.$description: Talent-list page base, text on pink surface.

page.$description: Default page background. Resolves to primitive/navy.

overlay.$description: Pink statement block on homepage. Resolves to primitive/pink.

primary.$description: Default body + heading text on dark bg. Resolves to primitive/cream.

accent.$description: Highlighted / active text, links, active nav. Resolves to primitive/pink.

on-overlay.$description: Text placed on the pink overlay surface. Resolves to primitive/black.

subtle.$description: Pill / filter / search borders on navy. Cream at 30% alpha.

default.$description: Default link / interactive. Resolves to primitive/pink.

hover.$description: Link / interactive hover. Resolves to primitive/cream.

headline.$description: Display typeface. Used only for display-xl page H1s.

body.$description: Body typeface. Nav, headings, body copy, labels.

display-xl.$description: Page H1s (Talent, Joe Connor, Music Video, Film & TV, We are rogue).

display-lg.$description: Homepage pink statement block, News section heading.

heading-lg.$description: Subsection heading (e.g. Contact city labels like 'London').

body-xl.$description: Talent / director names. Stable across breakpoints.

body-md.$description: Default body copy, nav, filter pills, footer lines.

body-sm.$description: Footer copyright, news-grid titles, thumbnail caption.

tight.$description: Display sizes, page H1s, name-style lists.

normal.$description: Default body copy and reading contexts.

loose.$description: Pill labels, nav links, footer address blocks.

10.$description: News section internal gap. Non-8pt-grid, preserved from Figma.

15.$description: News thumbnail-to-caption. Non-8pt-grid, preserved from Figma.

16.$description: Pill padding, footer social gap, nav vertical padding.

20.$description: Film thumbnail internal padding, mobile page h-padding.

24.$description: News inter-block gap, Talent list per-column row gap.

32.$description: Footer outer gap, section inner gap.

40.$description: Default desktop page h-padding, filter section gap.

80.$description: Film-detail + Contact h-padding, homepage news bottom padding.

pill.$description: All pill-shaped elements (filter pills, search, back button, copy-link, genre dropdown).

max.$description: Figma's designed desktop canvas. Fluid scaling upper bound.

fast.$description: Hover / focus micro-interactions. Value in ms.

normal.$description: Default transition (e.g. talent-page video crossfade). ms.

standard.$description: Standard ease. Figma-only token. In Webflow, defined as CSS custom property --motion-easing-standard in site custom code (size variables reject cubic-bezier()).

in.$description: Ease-in for elements leaving view. Figma-only token; see easing/standard note.

out.$description: Ease-out for elements entering view. Figma-only token; see easing/standard note.
